rumorTemplates: I heard there's {monster} roaming the {region}.
{monster} was spotted in the {region} not long ago.
Avoid the {region} if you can. There's {monster} out there.
Travelers say {monster} lurks somewhere in the {region}.
A merchant swore he barely escaped {monster} in the {region}.
The locals warn about {monster} prowling the {region}.
Some adventurers went to the {region} and never came back. They say {monster} got them.
There's good coin to be made hunting {monster} in the {region}, if you're brave enough.
A shepherd claimed to have seen {monster} near the {region} at dusk.
Folk around here whisper about {monster} haunting the {region}.
Word at the tavern is that {monster} has been terrorizing the {region}.
A wounded soldier stumbled in raving about {monster} in the {region}.
The roads through the {region} aren't safe. {monster} has been seen there.
They say the {region} is cursed — {monster} guards something hidden there.
A bounty was posted for {monster} last seen in the {region}.
Old timers say {monster} has always nested somewhere in the {region}.
A peddler mentioned {monster} blocking the trails through the {region}.
Scouts report fresh tracks of {monster} all over the {region}.
The militia refuses to patrol the {region} ever since {monster} appeared.
A dying explorer whispered something about {monster} and treasure in the {region}.
There's a sealed door carved into the rock face somewhere in the {region}. Nobody's found the key — or lived to tell what's behind it.
An old dungeon entrance was found in the {region} after a landslide. The stonework is ancient — older than anything around here.
A farmer plowing near the {region} broke through into a chamber below. He heard breathing down there and ran.
They say there's a well in the {region} that goes down much further than it should. Some kind of complex underneath.
Dwarven runes were found carved into a cliff in the {region}. A scholar said they mark the entrance to a forgotten vault.
A sinkhole opened in the {region} and swallowed a cart whole. The driver crawled out raving about pillars and torchlight below.
There's an old crypt beneath a ruined chapel in the {region}. The lower levels have never been mapped. {monster} was seen near the entrance.
Miners in the {region} broke into a natural cavern. They found worked stone walls and bones stacked floor to ceiling.
The cellars under the old fort in the {region} connect to something deeper. Soldiers used to dare each other to go past the third door.
A hidden staircase was found behind a waterfall in the {region}. The steps are worn smooth by centuries of use.
They say the ruins in the {region} are just the top floor. The real complex goes five levels down, maybe more.
There's a standing stone in the {region} that casts no shadow at noon. Old folk say it marks where the dead kings are buried.
A trapper found a bronze trapdoor buried under moss in the {region}. He couldn't open it alone. Something knocked back when he pounded on it.
Every full moon, lights flicker underground in the {region}. You can see them through the cracks in the earth if you know where to look.
A map was found on a dead thief showing tunnels beneath the {region}. Three Xs mark spots no one has checked.
The old aqueduct in the {region} has a side passage bricked up centuries ago. A mason said the mortar is crumbling.
Charcoal burners in the {region} refuse to work after dark. They hear chanting rising from below the ground.
A toppled obelisk in the {region} has a hollow base. Inside, stairs spiral down into the dark. {monster} guards the upper landing.
There's a barrow mound in the {region} the locals won't go near. They say the door was sealed with silver nails that have all rusted away.
An earthquake last winter cracked the ground in the {region} and revealed carved stone corridors. Nobody's gone deeper than the first room.
A child found a gold coin in a rabbit burrow in the {region}. The coin is from a kingdom that fell three hundred years ago.
Fishermen say there's a stone archway visible beneath the water in the {region} when the river runs low in summer.
A hermit living in the {region} claims to have found a door behind a false wall in the old tower. He's too scared to open it alone.
The trees in one part of the {region} grow in a perfect circle. Dig at the center and you hit flagstone two feet down.
An old woman says her grandmother spoke of a library buried under the {region}, sealed to protect its books from a long-forgotten war.
{monster} has been crawling out of a hole in the {region} for weeks now. Whatever is down there, it's not a natural cave.
A merchant's horse fell through the ground in the {region} and landed in a tiled corridor. The merchant left the horse and fled.
They found bones in the {region} wearing armor nobody recognizes. The dead were arranged in rows, like they'd been guarding something below.
A priest says there's a catacomb network under the {region} connected to an old plague cemetery. Some of the dead may not be resting easy.
Smoke rises from the ground in the {region} on cold mornings — not steam, smoke. Something down there is still burning.

plains.label: Plains
descriptions: There are several large craters in the green fields here. Something violent must have hit the ground from the sky in the past.
Crushed skulls and rusty swords are scattered around the hills here. You can almost hear the noises and screams of the ancient battlefield.
A tall stone tower fell and now lay crushed on the ground. A few small bunnies run and hide under its stone bricks.
A violent earthquake left the ground here broken with deep and narrow chasms. If listening carefully, one can hear eerie sounds coming from deep inside.
Several large geysers discharge boiling streams of water and vapour every few minutes.
A vast field of colourful flowers covers the shallow hills here. Butterflies and bees hop from flower to flower.
There's a perfect circle of large stones, each standing tall above the ground. In the center, a shallow pit seems to have hosted a bonfire not too long ago.
A pile of stones form a pyramid of steps, tall enough to provide a better vantage point over the region. At the top, a rusty old sword is planted blade first inside the ground.
The grasslands here are lush and green, but every now and then there's a perfectly dug cubic pit in the mud, much like a fresh and ready grave.
Giant iron shrapnel, as big as tree trunks, erect from the ground every hundred feet or so. It is as if they fell down from the sky.
Carcasses of farm animals are scattered around, some in worse shape than others. Swarms of flies are hovering over them like dark veils in the wind.
A small lake sits between the lush green hills here. At night, countless mysterious forms glow an eerie blue light in its deep water.
A small lake sits between the black rocky hills here, its water darker than night. Some dead fish are floating near its banks.
locations: at the top of a hill
hideouts: behind a waterfall
under the ruins of an old fortress
inside an oak

forest.label: Forest
descriptions: Giant red, purple and blue mushrooms grow beside the trees here, their colors are vibrant and bright, much like gemstones.
The trees here are naked and twisted. Their branches reach down like bony claws. Was this place cursed in days long gone?
So big and tall are the trees here. Their tops are almost hidden by the dense mist. Their trunks are as wide as a hut. Some of them have planks of wood attached, forming a ladder.
A huge, lush tree is standing in a clearing here, covered with colourful flowers and holding a sweet berry inside. Birds fly cheerfully around it.
Moss covered ruins of an ancient stone structure emerge from within the vegetation. Carvings of spirals and swirls decorate some of the larger stones.
The forest is dense and dark here, but countless clusters of phosphorescent fungi are growing near the base of the trunks, creating a luminous colourful glow above the ground.
Dense ivy and vegetation cover an old skeleton of a dragon, as if sleeping peacefully in a clearing surrounded by the trees.
Dense ivy and vegetation cover an old skeleton of a giant humanoid, lying face down in a clearing surrounded by the trees.
Ropes tangle down from the branches here. On some of them, human-sized straw-made figures are hanging by their canvas covered heads.
Dozens of giant dead tree trunks are laying on the ground here, covered with moss and undergrowth. Some of them seem to have a face, with a frozen expression of agony.
An oversized statue of a warrior holding a sword against the ground stands proudly in a clearing here. Fresh flowers were recently placed near its base.
An oversized statue of a king holding a sword against the ground stands proudly in a clearing here. Fresh flowers were recently placed near its base.
An oversized statue of a queen holding a sword against the ground stands proudly in a clearing here. Fresh flowers were recently placed near its base.
There's a stream of clear water here, flowing gently between the woods, over the smooth rock ground.
Colourful flowers, berry shrubs and mushrooms grow under the woods here, dense enough to almost entirely cover a large number of human-like bones.
A small pond sits between the woods here. At night, countless mysterious forms glow an eerie purple light deep in the water.
locations: where the woods meet a large hill
hideouts: under the ruins of an ancient city
in one of the tree covered hills
near an abandoned stronghold, deep in the woods

desert.label: Desert
descriptions: The sand here is as dark as the night. Not a fire nor a volcano could have been the cause.
You can clearly see bones revealing under the dunes when the wind shifts the sand. This was no land of peace.
Surrounded by the soft dunes, a huge rock shaped like a dome is planted in the sand. It is almost too slippery to climb on.
Either wind or some other force creates dozens of giant sand vortexes here, as tall as the eye can see.
There are numerous sinkholes in the sands here. Some of them are big enough to swallow an inn.
The wind here is gentle and the sand is soft and warm. Large canopied desert trees provide enough shadow to rest or camp under.
Vast dunes stretch in all directions, shimmering in the desert heat. The sun makes the sand scorching hot.
Tall pillars of rock emerge from the sands here, like giant columns to support the cloudless sky.
The sand here is riddled with small craters, as if a cluster of rocks rained violently from above.
A giant perfect wall of stones stands lonely and unconnected in the middle of the wasteland, with only empty stretches of sand to surround it.
Gusts of warm desert wind sweep and swirl the sands, creating ghost-like clouds of desert dust.
locations: beside the ruins of a pyramid
hideouts: under the ruins of an ancient temple
underground
near an abandoned ritual site

swamps.label: Swamps
descriptions: The trees here are dark and dripping, leaning over the murky water. There are hissing noises all around, and the air is thick and humid.
These marshes are dark and thick. Rotting tree trunks are scattered around, some are floating, some are splintered in the black mud.
To walk here one must submerge deep in the swamp and suffer not only the wet and mud, but the occasional leech and water centipede.
The mud here is deep enough to sink a tall boot, and has boils that emit a vile scent of rot into the air.
Dense fog covers the wet ground here. It is difficult to tell what lies ahead or what lurks under your feet.
Tall and naked trees are all submerged in the muddy water. They are so dense and close to each other, making navigation and travel a challenge.
The land here is drier, easier to walk on and can provide a good camping site.
The area here is hilly and covered with soggy bushes growing between many small streams of watery mud.
The land here is mostly dry. A small lake with clear water provides a good opportunity for fishing and camping next to it.
Murky dark water covers most of the land here. Rotting tree trunks, partially submerged, provide the occasional improvised beam bridge for travel.
Large, entangled roots provide some solid ground to walk on in the desert of mud here.
In between murky puddles, mudcracked patches of land provide a thin dry crust to walk on. Few water bushes are sparsely scattered around.
locations: on a dry patch of land
hideouts: under a group of mounds in the area
under a large patch of rotting tree trunks
within the muddy hills
under the ruins of an old keep
under the ruins of an ancient settlement

mountains.label: Mountains
descriptions: A thundering waterfall drops hundreds of feet down from an overhang in the steep slopes, forming a cloud of raging water at the base.
A giant peak stands taller than any of the mountains around it. An eerie red glow surrounding its top is visible from afar.
Waterfalls of lava flow from caves in a cliff, melting pieces of rock as they fall and form a river of inferno in the deep canyon.
The skeleton of a huge dragon is fossilised in one of the cliff faces here. Its wings are spread as if it was about to fly to the clouds one last time.
Multiple plateaus separated by seemingly bottomless chasms are connected with fragile rope bridges. The strong wind swings the bridges from side to side, making crossing them a terrifying experience.
Giant boulders are hanging in mid air by some kind of invisible magic. Some have rope ladders attached, reaching all the way down for anyone to climb.
A small patch of dark clouds circle an even darker peak. Jolts of lightning flash from within, followed by rumbling thunders.
The narrow and winding trails here are on the faces of the cliffs. Carelessness or combat are especially risky here.
The path here leads to a cliffside, more than a hundred feet tall. Planks of wood attached against the rocky wall form the only way ahead.
The passages here are surrounded with steep vertical cliffs and are branching to all directions like a fractured maze.
Two giant stone figures of guards, gazing into the sky and holding a sword against the ground are carved on both cliff sides of the valley here.
The rock formations here are sharp, pointy and dark. Walking here feels like entering the skull of a colossal monster.
Small unexplained earthquakes tremble the rocks here a few times a day. Loose rocks and boulders may block the pathways, or even worse, fall from above unexpectedly.
Dense fog makes travelling on the trails here difficult and slow. The reduced visibility renders it almost impossible to scout for danger.
Weird colourful crystal formations are decorating the rocky walls here. Mesmerising rays of light are bouncing from their countless facets.
Giant thin pillars of rocks are barely supporting even bigger plates of stone. Some of these huge mushroom-like formations have already collapsed. The others are likely to fall as well soon.
locations: on the edge of the cliffs, at the end of a winding steep trail
across a seemingly bottomless chasm, where a rope bridge meets an overhang
near the base of a steep cliff
near the base of the tallest mountain
hideouts: behind a waterfall
inside a cave on the cliff
inside an old volcano

tundra.label: Tundra
descriptions: The ice here is blindingly bright in daylight. It is almost too much to bear for those who are accustomed to the darkness of the depths.
The ice plateaus here are mostly opaque, but every now and then it reveals ominous shadows of creatures swimming or perhaps lurking underneath.
In the middle of the icy wasteland, a large round snowy rock emerges from the snow. Easy enough to climb on and perhaps find some shelter from the cold.
The ice here is thick but broken and cracked. It is a challenge to find a safe path to follow, and quite often, a leap is required to move about.
The snow here is soft to walk on. Too soft. In some places, taking the next step means falling down deep into a sinkhole.
Gusts of wind swirl the soft snow in the air, making it difficult to walk safely and comfortably as it obscures the vision and hits any exposed skin with a freezing sting.
Vast plateaus of ice stretch in all directions, feature-less and monotonous. Navigating is difficult without any distant landmarks.
Tall pillars of ice emerge from the snow here, as if water has risen from the ground, only to be captured by the frost.
The snow here is riddled with giant craters. Something with much force and velocity must have fallen from the sky.
The ruins of a giant wall of ice can be seen in the distance. The formation is unnatural, unmaintained, and impressive.
There are caverns of translucent ice here. Frozen creatures and ancient artifacts could be spotted if walking inside them.
There are several deep frozen chasms here, with unnatural thin bridges providing the only way to cross.
There's a glacier here, almost impossible to climb through, with fragile excavated tunnels dug in it to provide an unsafe passage.
There's a large ice wall here, forming a natural dam, blocking a large body of icy water from flooding the area.
A frozen waterfall is the only way to march north from here and will require climbing or rappelling to cross it.
A frozen waterfall is the only way to march south from here and will require climbing or rappelling to cross it.
A frozen waterfall is the only way to march north-east from here and will require climbing or rappelling to cross it.
A frozen waterfall is the only way to march south-east from here and will require climbing or rappelling to cross it.
A frozen waterfall is the only way to march north-west from here and will require climbing or rappelling to cross it.
A frozen waterfall is the only way to march south-west from here and will require climbing or rappelling to cross it.
Several dome shaped shelters are scattered on the snowy planes here, providing a convenient hideout from the cold.
hideouts: under the ruins of an ancient temple
underground
near an abandoned ritual site
under the ruins of an ancient settlement
inside an ancient iceberg

jungle.label: Jungle
descriptions: Droplets of water fall down from the oversized leaves of the tall trees here. Ancient stone made totem-like pillars emerge from the undergrowth, each with a different carving of an animal.
This part of the jungle has a very dense undergrowth of bushes and vines. A sword or a machete is likely needed to carve the way forward.
The trees here are naked and twisted. Their branches reach down like bony claws. Was this place cursed in days long gone?
The trees here are big and tall. Their tops are almost hidden by the dense mist. Their trunks are as wide as a hut. Some of them have planks of wood attached, forming a ladder.
A huge, lush tree is standing in a clearing here, covered with colourful flowers and holding a sweet berry inside. Birds fly cheerfully around it.
Moss covered ruins of an ancient stone structure emerge from within the vegetation. Carvings of spirals and swirls decorate some of the larger stones.
The forest is dense and dark here, but countless clusters of phosphorescent fungi are growing near the base of the trunks, creating a luminous colourful glow above the ground.
Dense ivy and vegetation cover an old skeleton of a dragon, as if sleeping peacefully in a clearing surrounded by the jungle trees.
Dense ivy and vegetation cover an old skeleton of a giant humanoid, lying face down in a clearing surrounded by the jungle trees.
Ropes tangle down the branches here. On some, straw-made figures of humanoids are hanging down by their canvas covered heads.
Dozens of giant dead tree trunks are laying on the ground here, covered with moss and undergrowth. Some of them seem to have a face, with a frozen expression of agony.
An oversized statue of an angry demon holding a sword against the ground stands proudly in a clearing here. Fresh flowers were recently placed near its base.
An oversized statue of a giant sleeping monkey holding a sword against the ground stands proudly in a clearing here. Fresh flowers were recently placed near its base.
An oversized statue of three robed priestesses holding a sword against the ground stands proudly in a clearing here. Fresh flowers were recently placed near its base.
There's a stream of clear water here, flowing gently between the jungle trees, over the smooth rock ground.
Colourful plants and mushrooms grow within the undergrowth here — almost densely enough to hide the bones of an alien creature.
A small pond sits between the jungle trees here. At night, countless mysterious forms glow an eerie purple light deep in the water.
locations: where the jungle meets a tall mountain
hideouts: under the ruins of an ancient temple
within the dense undergrowth
near an abandoned ritual site, deep in the jungle
under the remains of an ancient settlement
under the ruins of an ancient ziggurat

ocean.label: Ocean
descriptions: The sea here is calm and deep blue, stretching endlessly to the horizon. Seabirds circle above, diving for fish.
Waves crash against jagged rocks that jut out of the water like broken teeth. Barnacles and seaweed cling to their sides.
A thick fog rolls over the water here, muffling all sound. Shapes appear and vanish in the mist — rocks, or perhaps something else.
The water is crystal clear here, revealing a colourful reef far below the surface. Schools of fish dart between the corals.
Debris from a shipwreck floats on the surface — barrels, planks, and torn sails. Whatever happened here was recent.
A massive whirlpool churns in the distance, pulling driftwood and flotsam into its spiralling maw.
The sea is unnaturally still here, like a vast mirror. Not a ripple, not a wave. The silence is unnerving.
Dark shapes move beneath the surface, too large to be fish. They circle slowly before descending into the depths.
Bioluminescent plankton light up the water at night, turning the sea into a field of drifting blue-green stars.
A chain of small rocky islands dots the water here, each barely large enough for a campfire. Tide pools glimmer between the stones.
The water here is dark and cold, far deeper than the surrounding sea. Sailors call places like this bottomless.
Floating mats of kelp and seaweed stretch across the surface, thick enough to slow a boat and hide what lurks below.
A half-sunken stone tower rises from the waves, its lower floors submerged. Barnacles and coral have claimed it as their own.
The remains of a sea wall or ancient pier extend from a submerged ruin. Whatever civilisation built this is long gone.
locations: near a cluster of small islands
near the wreckage of a ship
hideouts: inside an underwater cave
within the hull of a sunken ship
beneath a submerged ruin

variants.hazard: There's a 1-in-6 chance once a day for a sandstorm, reducing visibility and movement rate.
There's a 1-in-6 chance once a day for a sandstorm, reducing visibility and movement rate.
There's a 1-in-6 chance once a day for a sandstorm, reducing visibility and movement rate.
There's a 1-in-6 chance once a day for a sandstorm, reducing visibility and movement rate.
There's a 1-in-6 chance once a day for a sandstorm, reducing visibility and movement rate.
There's a 1-in-6 chance once a week for a flood during the wet season.
There's a 1-in-6 chance once a week for a flood during the wet season.
There's a 1-in-6 chance once a week for a flood during the wet season.
There's a 1-in-6 chance once a day for an avalanche.
There's a 1-in-6 chance once a day for an avalanche.
There's a 1-in-6 chance once a day for an avalanche.
Dry Season: 1-in-6 chance per week for a rockslide. Wet Season: 1-in-6 chance per week for a landslide. Cold Season: 1-in-6 chance per day for an avalanche.
Dry Season: 1-in-6 chance per week for a rockslide. Wet Season: 1-in-6 chance per week for a landslide. Cold Season: 1-in-6 chance per day for an avalanche.
There's a 1-in-6 chance once a day for an avalanche.
There's a 1-in-6 chance once a day for an avalanche.
There's a 1-in-6 chance once a day for an avalanche.
There's a 1-in-6 chance once a day for a sudden squall, capsizing small boats and scattering cargo.
There's a 1-in-6 chance once a day for a rogue wave threatening vessels.
There's a 1-in-6 chance once a day for a sudden squall or dense fog bank.

effects: The liquid is strongly acidic. Wading through it deals 1d4 damage per round of contact.
Drinking from it restores 1d6 HP (once per person, per day).
The pool is unnaturally still — nothing disturbs its surface, not even wind or rain. Gazing into it too long causes a creeping unease.
Anything submerged too long begins to petrify, stiffening and hardening within moments.
A demonic visage appears in the reflection, whispering dark promises. Save vs Spells or be compelled to return here each night.
The liquid tastes foul and smells of rot, but is otherwise harmless to those who don't drink it.
The pool glows faintly at night with an eerie bioluminescent light, visible from a great distance.
Strange coins and corroded offerings litter the bottom — this place has been used as a shrine for generations.
Bathing in the pool for 1 hour grants Advantage on the next Check or Attack, but requires a DC 12 CON save to avoid catching a chill (Disadvantage on DEX for 24 hours).

Casting a spell into the pool doubles the damage of future castings of that spell for 24 hours (if applicable), but the caster gets exhausted and has disadvantage on any skill check or saving throw for 1 hour.
Touching the water reveals a Mirrored Portal; jumping in transports you to a 'shadow' version of this hex (GMs discretion).
The pool is a Memory Well: drinking it restores one forgotten spell or daily ability, but causes 1d4 psychic damage.

plains: hidden deep inside a burial mound
deep inside the mouth of a giant stone skull
under a wooden trapdoor buried 5 feet in the ground
under the ruins of an old fortress
at the bottom of a false outhouse

forest: deep inside the trunk of a giant oak, at the bottom of an excavated spiral staircase
under the ruins of an ancient temple, masked by dense undergrowth
deep inside the mouth of a giant stone skull, entirely covered with moss and ivy
in the basement of an abandoned inn
inside an abandoned wooden cabin, under loose floor boards
desert: under a wooden trapdoor buried 5 feet into the sand, with only an arrow-shaped sign pointing down hinting on the location
deep inside the mouth of a giant stone craved skull, partly buried under a dune
in the basement of an abandoned inn
inside a cave on a formation of rock surrounded by dunes
inside an abandoned wooden hut, under loose floor boards
swamps: partially submerged under the roots of a dying willow
inside an old moss-covered crypt in the heart of the marsh
under the foundations of a tilted, half-sunken manor
behind a curtain of hanging moss in a natural grotto
revealed by a receding tide of murky sludge
mountains: in a cave on the face of cliff, at the end of a rope bridge above a chasm
inside a cave, hidden behind a raging waterfall
inside a cave on the face of a steep cliff
under the ruins of an old fortress
in the basement of an abandoned inn
inside an abandoned wooden cabin, under loose floor boards
tundra: inside an ancient iceberg, revealed by a recent thaw
at the bottom of a deep crevasse, sheltered from the winds
under the frozen ruins of a watchtower
inside a cave on the face of a frozen cliff
buried deep under a drift of eternal snow
jungle: choked by ancient vines inside a ruined ziggurat
at the center of a forgotten stone circle, hidden by ferns
deep inside the maw of a mossy stone idol
under the floor of a ruined wooden village raised on stilts
inside a humid cavern where the air is thick with spores

npcTraits: with a deep scar on the right arm

magicItems.Title: Wand of Secret Door Detection (1d6 charges)
Helm of Reading Languages and Magic

campfireTales: stares into the embers and shares a harrowing tale of a misguided expedition into {dungeon} many years ago. They describe hearing whispered voices trailing just behind them in the dark, and claim they only survived because their torch died at the exact moment a patrol marched past.

laughs uproariously and tells a highly exaggerated story about getting scammed at a rowdy tavern in {settlement}. It involves a three-legged goat, a wager over a wheel of moldy cheese, and a hasty escape through a kitchen window at dawn.
goes quiet for a moment, tracing a scar on their arm, and mentions losing a dear friend to a wicked blade trap deep inside {dungeon}. They offer a solemn toast 'to those who stayed in the dark.'

claims to have been born in the dusty alleys of {settlement} and vividly describes the Festival of Lanterns they hold every summer. They speak with genuine longing of the roasted honey-nuts sold by the street vendors.
recounts a terrifying, moonless night spent hiding in a ditch near {dungeon}, watching an endless procession of silent, pale figures carrying gold down into the earth.
pulls out a battered, out-of-tune lute and sings an old, melancholic folk song about the tragic betrayal and fall of the last lord of {settlement}.

leans in close and whispers an unbelievable rumor about a king's ransom in uncut rubies still hidden somewhere in the flooded lower levels of {dungeon}. They even sketch a rough, half-remembered map in the dirt.
shares a hearty laugh over the time their entire caravan got chased out of the gates of {settlement} by an infuriated baker over a misunderstanding about a supposedly 'magical' sack of flour.
tells a grim, cautionary tale about a rival, heavily-armed merchant caravan that vanished without a single trace on the main road heading towards {settlement} just three winters ago.
speaks fondly, and a bit sadly, of their childhood sweetheart who still lives right across from the main well in {settlement}. They pull out a small, faded wooden carving they kept all these years.

brags loudly about outsmarting a cunning, subterranean goblin tribe while desperately trying to map the upper levels of {dungeon}. The story involves throwing a bag of sneezing powder into a ventilation shaft.
reminisces with a watering mouth about the delicious, albeit strange, spiced swamp-rat skewers served under the flickering lanterns in the night markets of {settlement}.
lowers their voice to tell of a mysterious, veiled prophet they once met on the road near {settlement}, who predicted the very storm that is keeping you all by this fire tonight.
tells of a cursed, golden idol they once purchased in {settlement} that brought them nothing but misery and bad weather, until they finally threw it down a deep shaft near the entrance of {dungeon}.
shares a thrilling, fast-paced story of their days as a young courier, culminating in a breakneck horseback chase away from wolf-riders all the way to the protective walls of {settlement}.
glances around nervously and whispers a secret they bought from a dying thief: a hidden door in the lower levels of {dungeon} will only open if you whisper the word '{magicWord}'.
draws a crude map in the dirt, marking the location of a concealed lever hidden behind {dungeonLocation} in {dungeon}, claiming it disarms an otherwise deadly and unavoidable trap.
sells you a piece of free advice: deep inside {dungeon}, behind {dungeonLocation}, lies a hidden stash of treasure untouched for centuries.
claims their grandfather helped build the lower levels of {dungeon}. They say there is a hidden button concealed inside {dungeonLocation} that opens a shortcut to the vault.
tells of a mad wizard they once escorted near {dungeon}, who mumbled in their sleep about a magical portal that requires speaking the word '{magicWord}' to activate.
confides in you that a hidden armory lies sealed in {dungeon}, and to break the seal, one must find {dungeonLocation} and whisper the password: '{magicWord}'.

a cage made entirely of woven human bones
a perfectly preserved library bookshelf
a shattered, star-shaped crystal embedded in the floor
a cluster of glowing, purplish quartz
a mural depicting a seven-eyed serpent
an intricately carved ivory door frame
a pile of rusted knights' armor
a massive, rusted dwarven anvil

a brass telescope pointed at a blank rock wall

a large, unlit bronze brazier shaped like a dragon

patronTypes: a weary traveler nursing a drink
with a pair of rowdy mercenaries laughing loudly
a hooded figure in the corner watching the room
with a group of local farmers complaining about the weather
a traveling minstrel tuning their instrument
a exhausted courier catching their breath
with a pair of scholars debating an ancient text
a local hunter trading pelts for a meal

descriptions: The ruins of an ancient watchtower are perched on a nearby rise, its stones weathered by centuries of wind.
There’s an old abandoned watchtower overlooking the area, its wooden stairs long since rotted away.
There's a recently built but seemingly unstaffed watchtower standing tall, its banners fluttering idly in the breeze.
The burned remains of a small village can be found, its charred timbers sinking into the earth.
There's a recently abandoned village, windows shuttered and doors left unlatched, feeling as if the inhabitants fled in a hurry.
The hollow shells of stone cottages mark a village where, legend says, the entire population vanished in a single night, leaving their dinner half-eaten on the tables.
A thick, unnerving silence hangs over these ruins; local lore claims a 'crawling mist' descended from the hills, taking everyone except those who fled toward {settlement}.
Once a thriving farming hamlet, this place was 'reclaimed' by the wilds after a series of brutal nocturnal raids by a pack of hungry {monster}s.
Vines and moss have nearly reclaimed this settlement, which served as a vital waypoint for {settlement} players until the wells mysteriously turned to salt.
The village square is dominated by a single, massive oak tree hung with empty birdcages; travelers claim the inhabitants were whispered away by the wind itself.
This cluster of hovels was abandoned decades ago during the 'Great Fever'; the nearby woods are still said to be haunted by the spirits of those left behind.
The crumbling ruins of an ancient altar can be found, its surface etched with faded runes and stained by time.
There’s a stone-made signaling tower standing as a silent sentinel over the landscape.
There’s a wood-made signaling tower, its construction sturdy but showy signs of neglect.
signalingTower.supplemental: Finding the tower will eliminate any risk of getting lost in this region.

descriptions: There are {number} abandoned and half-broken wagons scattered across the area.
{NumberCap} wagons were abandoned and looted, their contents long gone.
{NumberCap} heavily damaged wagons were left to decay, their wheels sinking into the mud.
The bodies of {number} dead adventurers were thrown to rot, their gear picked clean by scavengers.
{NumberCap} unfortunate adventurers met their death here, their poses suggesting a final, desperate stand.

sacrificialSite.descriptionTemplate: There's a sacrificial site with burnt {subject} remains.

descriptions: The headless remains of {monster} can be found, the ground stained dark around it.
The headless rotting remains of a beheaded {monster} can be found, attracting a swarm of flies.
The chopped head of {monster} was left to rot on a crude spike.
The brutalized remains of {monster} were left to rot, likely the work of a more powerful predator.
